[User] You are the manager actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced JSON code block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be complete_run and the payload must match exactly:
```json
{
  "kind": "complete_run",
  "payload": {
    "status": "succeeded",
    "summary": "Deterministic paseo phase plan completed."
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "complete_run",
  "payload": {
    "status": "succeeded",
    "summary": "Deterministic paseo phase plan completed."
  }
}
```
